Notes: Lightning ties school record with 6th straight win ... Goldey-Beacom earns
15th straight win over Georgian Court ... Briana Richmond-Peters (GBC) scores
season-high 11 points (3rd 10+ pt. game of career) ... GBC holds opponent
under 50 pts. for 7th time in last 9 games.
Game.Officials: Robert Csigi,  Michael Jackson,  Luis Torres
